headline: Is Comfort Systems Stock Worth Buying Before Q2 Earnings?
summary: FIX Q2 earnings are likely to benefit from a record backlog, strong data-center demand and healthy margins, despite its premium valuation.

headline: Can Quanta's Execution Certainty Strengthen Its Competitive Position?
summary: Can PWR's execution certainty and integrated delivery turn record backlog into a lasting competitive edge as infrastructure projects grow larger?

headline: Quanta Services Named 2026 Top U.S. Solar Solutions Provider by Solar Power World
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that it has been named the top solar solutions provider in the United States by Solar Power World for the third time in four years. Quanta operating companies, utilizing their combined expertise and collaborative efforts, installed more than 6,100 megawatts of domestic solar generating capacity in 2025.

headline: JP Morgan Downgrades Quanta Services to Neutral, Announces $714 Price Target
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Mark Strouse   downgrades Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) from Overweight to Neutral and announces $714 price target.

headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Stock Looks Pricey On Cash Flow And Earnings
summary: Quanta Services stock has delivered a very large 5 year return of 623.0%, yet the current checks suggest the shares now trade at a premium, with both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples pointing to an overvalued picture. Over the last 5 years, Quanta Services has returned 623.0%, which puts a lot of past gains into the current share price and raises the bar for future returns to justify it. Expectations for continued project demand and cash flow...
